=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
2/1/02
Sunrise, Florida
National Car Rental Center

Lineage: received as audio cd-r's > EAC v. 0.99 Prebeta 5 (Secure, Offset Correct)  WAV > TLH-FLAC (8) 


Disk One

I Am The Man, Thomas (Ralph Stanley/Larry Sparks)
To Ramona
It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin, Jack Anglin)
Gotta Serve Somebody
Tell Me That It Isn't True
High Water (for Charlie Patton)
Lonesome Day Blues
It Ain't Me, Babe
John Brown
Tangled Up In Blue

Disk Two

Summer Days
Sugar Baby
The Wicked Messenger
Rainy Day Women # 12 & 3
Things Have Changed
Like A Rolling Stone
Knockin' On Heaven's Door
Honest With Me
Blowin' In The Wind
